sb_prompt: FIND OUT WHAT CRITERIA THE OTHER CALLER WOULD USE IN SELECTING CHILD CARE SERVICES FOR A PRESCHOOLER.  IS IT EASY OR DIFFICULT TO FIND SUCH CARE?
raw_output:
Participants: Particiant A (PA) and Participaunt B (PB)

PA: Hi there, I was wondering if you could help me out. I need to find child care services for my preschooler but I don't really know where to start. Do you have any experience with this kind of thing?

PB: Yes, actually I do. My sister used to work at a daycare center so she gave me some advice on what to look for when choosing child care. What specifically are you looking for?
PA
